job_text:
Job Title: Senior AI Engineer
Company: Cortex Labs
Location: Berlin (Hybrid)
Required skills
- 5+ years of Python.
- Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, RAG, LLMs.
- FAISS or Chroma, PyTorch, Docker, AWS.
Preferred
- TypeScript, Next.js.
Education
- Master's in Computer Science or related.

job_text:
Robotics Engineer (Junior)
Responsibilities
- ROS2 nodes for mobile robots.
- PID controllers and Gazebo simulation.
- Control systems in MATLAB / Simulink.
Requirements
- BSc Robotics or Mechatronics. ROS, C++, Python.
